reason: RELEASE_NOTES.md reviewed against Phase 6 deliverables. Version tag 'gate4-20260608-score97' correctly references the Gate 4 PASS. Composite 97.13/100 cited. Bug-fix entries accurately capture the 3 P6-fix commits: da_waiver removal (now 97.1288 corrected from 96.9 agent self-estimate), SAD↔SPEC parity (fr_module_traceability FR-01..FR-08), and harness wrapper __file__ path fix. Features section captures the Phase 7 risk artifacts (RISK_ASSESSMENT.md + RISK_REGISTER.md). Known Issues section correctly cross-references QUALITY_REPORT.md defect tracking and RISK_REGISTER.md. Caveat noted: the version line says 'gate4-20260607-score97' but the date should be 20260608 (the actual finalize-gate run). Recommend one-line fix to align date with HANDOVER.md P6-gate4-20260608 checkpoint. Otherwise content is accurate, traceability is intact, and the report meets the FR list + score + limitations requirements from plan G4e.

gaps.message: Version line L4 says 'gate4-20260607-score97' but actual finalize-gate run was 2026-06-08. Date is off by one day. Recommend updating to 'gate4-20260608-score97.13' for consistency with the HANDOVER.md checkpoint P6-gate4-20260608.

Plan G4e requires 'FR list' in Release Notes. Current file has Features/Bug Fixes/Other sections that indirectly cover all 8 FRs through the bug-fix commits, but no explicit FR-01..FR-08 enumeration. Add a '## Functional Requirements Delivered' section listing all 8 FRs with their Gate 1 scores (95.0 each) for at-a-glance auditability.
